OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The ID of the live stream to connect to.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen for delete events on the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Whether to ignore dependencies when processing events from the live stream.

DATADOG_INTEL_INTEGRATION_API_URL.description: Datadog's API URL as provided by the integration. If your Datadog site is `https://app.datadoghq.com`, use `https://api.datadoghq.com/api/v2/security/threat-intel-feed`

DATADOG_INTEL_INDICATOR_TYPE.description: Types of indicators to send to the API. Accepted values: 'ip_address', 'domain', 'sha256'.

DATADOG_INTEL_DD_API_KEY.description: Datadog's API key. Sent on every request as the `dd-api-key` header to authenticate against `integration_api_url`

DATADOG_INTEL_DD_APPLICATION_KEY.description: Datadog's application key. Sent on every request as the `dd-application-key` header to authenticate against `integration_api_url`
